caption: A black background displays various social media handles and a website address. In the upper section, white text reads, "And you will come marching together with me, and so you'll see your song and your flag blossom." This sentence is repeated twice side-by-side. Below the text, a Facebook logo is paired with "/peoplesdispatch", a Twitter logo is paired with "@peoplesdispatch", and a blue globe icon is paired with the red word "Visit" and the white text "peoplesdispatch.org". As the sequence progresses, the layout shifts, with the social media handles moving to the left side of the screen while a vertical white oval shape appears on the right. The repeated sentence about marching and flags reappears at the bottom of the screen, though the final instance is partially cut off, reading "u'll see your song and your flag blossom."
